chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-84 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 16-03-2026. Mr. Abdul Hafeez Mari advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G a/w Inspector Muhammad Murad SHO PS Deeplo. = In compliance to the Order(s) dated 02-03-2026, 05-03-2026 and 09-03-2026, the alleged detenue Mst. Zarina has been produced by the S.H.O P.S Deeplo alongwith report and mashirnama of recovery, which are taken on record. The alleged detenue Mst. Zarina has stated in open Court that she was taken by her parents and now she is ready and willing to go/live with the petitioner / her husband. On direction, SHO P.S Deeplo recorded statement of the alleged detenue, wherein too she has re-iterated the same facts. Such statement is also taken on record. Since the alleged detenue is a sui juris lady and wants to go with her husband/ petitioner, therefore, she is set at liberty to go with her husband/ petitioner, who is present in the Court. The official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioner and the alleged detenue till their residence; whereas the private respondents No.5,6 and 7 are directed not to harass the petitioner and the alleged detenue and to act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, instant Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE *Saleem*
